creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text: It happened with 13.0 and 13.1. For now I have net.inet.tcp.sack.enable=0 but I plan to enable it again after 13.2 is released to see if it's fixed. Also the issue only happens in servers with specific and older hardware. I have servers with newer hardware and net.inet.tcp.sack.enable=1 and the issue didn't happen there (or I was just lucky).
